attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
ORDER_LINE_ID,
CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
THEATRE,
START_DATE,
EXPIRATION_DATE,
TRX_SOURCE_TYPE, 
TRX_ORIG_CODE,
ENRICHMENT_CODE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
BATCH_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX_XA ETPS
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX STPS
WHERE STPS.TRX_ORIG_CODE='XAAS' AND STPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID= ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
)

select
SMXSS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN SPMT.THEATRE  ELSE NULL END AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN SPMT.THEATRE  ELSE NULL END  AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END   AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' THEN SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO' THEN SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
NP_END_USER.PARTY_KEY AS NP_END_USER_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CAST(SPMT.START_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
CAST(SPMT.EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX SPMT
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SHIP_TO
 ON SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SHIP_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SHIP_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  AND SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SOLD_TO
 ON SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SOLD_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SOLD_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_BILL_TO
 ON SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_BILL_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_BILL_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_END_USER
 ON SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_END_USER.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_END_USER.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_END_USER.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT  SMXSS
ON SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
WHERE 
SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE='XAAS'

SELECT
 Coalesce (WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,N.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY)  AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) ,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) ,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) ,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_USER_THEATER_NAME ,N.END_USER_THEATER_NAME) , 'UNKNOWN') AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME ,N.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME) , 'UNKWOWN') AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,N.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) , -999) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 Coalesce (N.START_TV_DT ,WI.START_TV_DT) AS START_TV_DT ,
 CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT ,
 'I'	  ACTION_CODE,
 'I'	   DML_TYPE
FROM
 (
SELECT 
SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
MAX( SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX( BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX( SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX(END_USER_THEATER_NAME) AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
MAX(SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME) AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
MIN(START_TV_DT) AS START_TV_DT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_XAAS_SLSTRX
GROUP BY SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
) WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_XAAS_SLSTRX_TV N 
ON
WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY =N.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY

select
SPMT.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID,
SPMT.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
SPMT.THEATRE,
SPMT.START_DATE,
SPMT.EXPIRATION_DATE,
SPMT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE, 
SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE,
SPMT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SPMT.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX SPMT
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT  SMXSS
ON SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  WHERE SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE='XAAS'  AND SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT IS NULL
